TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Xi Zhiping sinpu == Palalanay ci Xi Zhiping sinpu Xi Zhiping sinpu (Hilber Jakob 1917-1985) o patenakay i pasawalian a Payleng wayfang dintokay no Tinsukiw, 1953 miheca mingitangit ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to fafa'eday citodongay i Kalingko a kowan to piparotoh, patorod to aocoren tonini ci'icelay nai Switzerland tayni i Posong "Nengnengaw", sa:an to pafaloco'an, manga'ay ko pisilsil to tatayni i Posong a malasingsi. Caay ko kafana'an oya masakapahay ho ci Xi Zhiping sinpu ko tayniay i Posong, caay ho ka pihayda ko itiraay a Switzerland, sacecay sa tayni itini misahalaka dademak, midemak to caayay ho ko no patenakay a halaka. Tada manga'ayan ko kalali'ay no Posong to malitosaay a sici to Payleng wayfang dintokay, nai ci Xi Zhiping sinpu ko pisatapangan. Onini a sinpu sa citofay sa to karetengay tofay, mirakarak to kasaco'ed no Posong. O sowal no cecay fafahiyan: kaemangan itira sikosya no Nang siaw i Posong i, harek no lahok to romi'ad mangengneng aca koya pakatofayay mita'elif i ka'ayaw, awa:ay manengneng ko Padaka a tamdaw, manengneng ci Xi Zhiping sinpu miceli' aca "Nga'ay ho sinpu." Oya sa a sinpu mahemek ko pipaca'of: "Nga'ay ho wawa." Mi'epap to tofay a miliyas, onini nga'ayay koda'itay "Nga'ay ho wawa." Sanay, mata'elif to ko mo^tep mihecaan, malo sakafolaw tayra i roma kitakit a caayay ka pawan a ka'ilolan. Nai ni Ou tintosi a sowal, no mako a niharatengan matalaw ci widang to matiniay marikecay a sinpu. O sowal nonini a tintosi takowan, 'ayaw no mihecaan caay ho ka fangcal ko saki'orip no pasawali, o saka'imeraw, ato saka nga'ay milecad to 'orip no itiniay, malakakeridan ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to saki kapolongan a kakaenen wata ko kickic, oya to laloma'an no kapolongan caay ka raheked to pinangan ningra. O nidemakan ni Xi Zhiping sinpu adahay ko nilahecian ningra, tinako, i 60, 70 to'ek no miheca, patireng cingra to kanga'ayan palahaday to cifana'ay sakadademak "Kongtong kaukong" tadamaan, o malasingsiay makikakaay ko polong no kasapitiliodan, ona singsi, saheto o nai Switzerland ato Europ a cifana'ay kapah a singsi. Ira ko cecay tadamaanay a mali'acaay a tawki pasowal sa: ta pitilid ha nangra i Kongtong kawkong i, wata ko talaw ci Xi Zhiping sinpuan, ano masamaamaanay ko nidemakan mikihar cingra, marikec cingra to demak no mitiliday. Mata'elif to ko pinapina a miheca no mitiliday ho i 'ayaw, mahirateng ho ko nika koda'itay no kasafa'inayan, todadayadaya mililis cingra to kafoti'an, to saka fangcal no foti' no kaemangay, ano caay ka nga'ay, micokar to oray matefad i sera i, paorayen ningra ta miliyas, ta mafoti' cingta itiya. Ira ko patado sanay micolar to oray a caayay patenol a wawa, miraoy to sapadipotaw ni Xi Zhiping sinpu. O kacahiwan ho no to'ek mihecaan itiya, caay pakalolol ko wawa to sapa'aca to pitilidan to saka'eca pitilid. Oya malamitomadaway a kakeridan a sinpu pasowal sa: paskoyoc ko 'orip i kaeman a caay pakalolol to sapitilid a payso, nokay sa mipakaen to kolong, ira ko cecay romi'ad tona pakatofay ci Xi Zhiping sinpu mita'elif, licayen ningra koya mitatoyay to kawkaw a wawa nao caay pitilid? Mafana' to kaeca no demak itiya, pasowal han ni Xi Zhiping sinpu: "ano sapitilidananay kiso i, mana demakan, kako sa ko nisafaloco'ay." han ningra, o kasasiroma no kicay to itiyaaay ho ato aniniay, hatira ko nidemakan no Payleng wayfang dintokay no Tinsukiw itini i pasawali a midama to mamipafatad mitilid a kaemangay wawa. Awaay ko misapinangay misa'osi tonini. I 1982 miheca, masapinang ko kaciadada to no fowa' a kang tona itira i Switzerland a mikilim to payso to pacakat ci Xi Zhiping sinpu, dengan to 6 folad ko 'orip iso han no ising ko sowal i cingraan, o nisafaloco'an ningra dengan o pasawaliay finawlan, ngitangit han ningra ko ising to "Kapatay no mako itira i niyaro ako i Posong" saan, caay pitengil to pacecay no ising, minakay tayni i Posong. Ira ko nano misawaday to i kongtong kawkong, minokay tayni pitilidan a malasingsi saci sowal sa: milalad to tayra i do'es no 'okak ko adada ni Xi Zhiping sinpu i, dadaya no romi'adan, matengil ko pilalaling to adada, awaay ko sadama, micocok i faloco' saan. Malawidangay tona mifalicay to sowal ni Xi Zhiping sinpu ci Si singsi pasowal takowanan, saikoray to tosa lipay ni Xi Zhiping sinpu itini i Senmo isingan i, o mitiliday kaemangay wawa no kongtong kawkong ko mahiratengay ningra, kinapinapina mitahidang to kaemangay tayni i kafoti'an ningra, milicay to sapa'icelaw a sowal. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, talifahalan pakalayap ci Si singsi to tahidang ni Xi Zhiping sinpu cingraan, mangalay sakatayraaw i loma' komaen to Shuijiao. Oya marariday mipawsa to kakaenen ci Si singsi, patayra han to ningra i loma' a komaen, patiko talaising i, milicay haca ira ho ko roma paromi'adan saan ho, mangalay cingra pakapaliding a mililis to liyok no isingan. Matiya sa o micohongay ko pitiko ni Xi Zhiping sinpu, sahacecay sa pasowal to kahacecay no loma' to ihakowaay mapatireng ko na loma' ya saan, oya iraayay a loma' o hakowaay mapatireng koraan saan, saikoray miahowid ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to patihi ni Si singsi to pinapina mahecaan cingraan, pafeli sa to cecay matiliday to ahowiday sanay a fati. Ikor no tosa miheca miliyas to ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to hekal mapatay, o fatadan no 'orip ningra itiniay i Posong. Tadamaan ko pitademan itiya miheca, militemoh ko Tawo, Nansin niyaro a kakitaan no Paywan finacadan mitademan no ngasaw. Itini tonini ira ko pacekilan a kimad: Saayaw katayni ni Xi Zhiping sinpu patenak i Posong i, oya kakitaan no Nansin ci Liw singsi ko micokeray, kapatay no wawa ni Liw singsi i 'ayaw, patorodan ko dengan wawa ci Xi Zhiping sinpu a madipot, cingra to ko midipotay tona wawa tangasa i pasawadan ningra to daykako. Mapatay ci Xi Zhiping sinpu i, o laloma'an ni Liw singsi safeleng sa militemoh to nai Switzerland a tamdaw, mihamham patayni i pitademan no sangasaw a sera. Itini i no laloma'an pitademan, oya satata'akay tadem ono ningra "Xi akong" no Switzerland a tamdaw saan. Piriridan:
S.PHON: == xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u == pa…ĺa…ĺanaj ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u (ńßi…ĺb~b~v…ôr *ako~ub~b~v ****-****) o~u pat…ônakaj i pasawa…ĺian a paj…ĺ…ôŇč wajfaŇč …¨~…ģinto~ukaj no~u tinso~u~ukiw, **** mińß…ô ¶a miŇčitaŇčit ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i ka…ĺiŇčko~u a ko~uwan to~u piparo~uto~uńß, pato~uro~u…¨~…ģ to~u ao~u ¶o~ur…ôn to~unini ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺaj nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ tajni i po~uso~uŇč "n…ôŇčn…ôŇčaw", sa:an to~u pafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an, maŇča °aj ko~u pisi…ĺsi…ĺ to~u tatajni i po~uso~uŇč a ma…ĺasiŇčsi. ¶aaj ko~u kafana °an o~uja masakapańßaj ńßo~u ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u ko~u tajniaj i po~uso~uŇč, ¶aaj ńßo~u ka pińßaj…¨~…ģa ko~u itiraaj a swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ, sa ¶…ô ¶aj sa tajni itini misańßa…ĺaka …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u ¶aajaj ńßo~u ko~u no~u pat…ônakaj a ńßa…ĺaka. ta…¨~…ģa maŇča °ajan ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °aj no~u po~uso~uŇč to~u ma…ĺito~usaaj a si ¶i to~u paj…ĺ…ôŇč wajfaŇč …¨~…ģinto~ukaj, nai ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u ko~u pisatapaŇčan. o~unini a sinpo~u~u sa ¶ito~ufaj sa to~u kar…ôt…ôŇčaj to~ufaj, mirakarak to~u kasa ¶o~u °…ô…¨~…ģ no~u po~uso~uŇč. o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßijan: ka…ômaŇčan itira siko~usja no~u naŇč siaw i po~uso~uŇč i, ńßar…ôk no~u …ĺańßo~uk to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maŇč…ôŇčn…ôŇč a ¶a ko~uja pakato~ufajaj mita °…ô…ĺif i ka °ajaw, awa:aj man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u pa…¨~…ģaka a tam…¨~…ģaw, man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u mi ¶…ô…ĺi ° a ¶a "Ňča °aj ńßo~u sinpo~u~u." o~uja sa a sinpo~u~u mańß…ôm…ôk ko~u pipa ¶a °o~uf: "Ňča °aj ńßo~u wawa." mi °…ôpap to~u to~ufaj a mi…ĺijas, o~unini Ňča °ajaj ko~u…¨~…ģa °itaj "Ňča °aj ńßo~u wawa." sanaj, mata °…ô…ĺif to~u ko~u mo~u Ēt…ôp mińß…ô ¶aan, ma…ĺo~u sakafo~u…ĺaw tajra i ro~uma kitakit a ¶aajaj ka pawan a ka °i…ĺo~u…ĺan. nai ni o~uo~u~u tinto~usi a so~uwa…ĺ, no~u mako~u a nińßarat…ôŇčan mata…ĺaw ¶i wi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u matiniaj marik…ô ¶aj a sinpo~u~u. o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~unini a tinto~usi tako~uwan, °ajaw no~u mińß…ô ¶aan ¶aaj ńßo~u ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u saki °o~urip no~u pasawa…ĺi, o~u saka °im…ôraw, ato~u saka Ňča °aj mi…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u °o~urip no~u itiniaj, ma…ĺakak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u saki kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a kaka…ôn…ôn wata ko~u ki ¶ki ¶, o~uja to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan ¶aaj ka rańß…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ to~u pinaŇčan niŇčra. o~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u a…¨~…ģańßaj ko~u ni…ĺańß…ô ¶ian niŇčra, tinako~u, i **, ** to~u °…ôk no~u mińß…ô ¶a, patir…ôŇč ¶iŇčra to~u kaŇča °ajan pa…ĺańßa…¨~…ģaj to~u ¶ifana °aj saka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômak "ko~uŇčto~uŇč kao~u~uko~uŇč" ta…¨~…ģamaan, o~u ma…ĺasiŇčsiaj makikakaaj ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u kasapiti…ĺio~u…¨~…ģan, o~una siŇčsi, sańß…ôto~u o~u nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ ato~u …ôo~u~uro~up a ¶ifana °aj kapańß a siŇčsi. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a ma…ĺi °a ¶aaj a tawki paso~uwa…ĺ sa: ta piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ńßa naŇčra i ko~uŇčto~uŇč kawko~uŇč i, wata ko~u ta…ĺaw ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~uan, ano~u masamaamaanaj ko~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan mikińßar ¶iŇčra, marik…ô ¶ ¶iŇčra to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj. mata °…ô…ĺif to~u ko~u pinapina a mińß…ô ¶a no~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ńßo~u i °ajaw, mańßirat…ôŇč ńßo~u ko~u nika ko~u…¨~…ģa °itaj no~u kasafa °inajan, to~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja…¨~…ģaja mi…ĺi…ĺis ¶iŇčra to~u kafo~uti °an, to~u saka faŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u fo~uti ° no~u ka…ômaŇčaj, ano~u ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj, mi ¶o~ukar to~u o~uraj mat…ôfa…¨~…ģ i s…ôra i, pao~uraj…ôn niŇčra ta mi…ĺijas, ta mafo~uti ° ¶iŇčta itija. ira ko~u pata…¨~…ģo~u sanaj mi ¶o~u…ĺar to~u o~uraj a ¶aajaj pat…ôno~u…ĺ a wawa, mirao~uj to~u sapa…¨~…ģipo~utaw ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u. o~u ka ¶ańßiwan ńßo~u no~u to~u °…ôk mińß…ô ¶aan itija, ¶aaj paka…ĺo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ ko~u wawa to~u sapa °a ¶a to~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan to~u saka °…ô ¶a piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. o~uja ma…ĺamito~uma…¨~…ģawaj a kak…ôri…¨~…ģan a sinpo~u~u paso~uwa…ĺ sa: pasko~ujo~u ¶ ko~u °o~urip i ka…ôman a ¶aaj paka…ĺo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ to~u sapiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ a pajso~u, no~ukaj sa mipaka…ôn to~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč, ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ to~una pakato~ufaj ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u mita °…ô…ĺif, …ĺi ¶aj…ôn niŇčra ko~uja mitato~ujaj to~u kawkaw a wawa nao~u ¶aaj piti…ĺi…¨~…ģ? mafana ° to~u ka…ô ¶a no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak itija, paso~uwa…ĺ ńßan ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u: "ano~u sapiti…ĺi…¨~…ģananaj kiso~u i, mana …¨~…ģ…ômakan, kako~u sa ko~u nisafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj." ńßan niŇčra, o~u kasasiro~uma no~u ki ¶aj to~u itijaaaj ńßo~u ato~u aniniaj, ńßatira ko~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan no~u paj…ĺ…ôŇč wajfaŇč …¨~…ģinto~ukaj no~u tinso~u~ukiw itini i pasawa…ĺi a mi…¨~…ģama to~u mamipafata…¨~…ģ miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ a ka…ômaŇčaj wawa. awaaj ko~u misapinaŇčaj misa °o~usi to~unini. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, masapinaŇč ko~u ka ¶ia…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u no~u fo~uwa ° a kaŇč to~una itira i swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a miki…ĺim to~u pajso~u to~u pa ¶akat ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan to~u * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u °o~urip iso~u ńßan no~u isiŇč ko~u so~uwa…ĺ i ¶iŇčraan, o~u nisafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an niŇčra …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u pasawa…ĺiaj finaw…ĺan, ŇčitaŇčit ńßan niŇčra ko~u isiŇč to~u "kapataj no~u mako~u itira i nijaro~u ako~u i po~uso~uŇč" saan, ¶aaj pit…ôŇči…ĺ to~u pa ¶…ô ¶aj no~u isiŇč, minakaj tajni i po~uso~uŇč. ira ko~u nano~u misawa…¨~…ģaj to~u i ko~uŇčto~uŇč kawko~uŇč, mino~ukaj tajni piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a ma…ĺasiŇčsi sa ¶i so~uwa…ĺ sa: mi…ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u tajra i …¨~…ģo~u °…ôs no~u °o~ukak ko~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u i, …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja no~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģan, mat…ôŇči…ĺ ko~u pi…ĺa…ĺa…ĺiŇč to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, awaaj ko~u sa…¨~…ģama, mi ¶o~u ¶o~uk i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° saan. ma…ĺawi…¨~…ģaŇčaj to~una mifa…ĺi ¶aj to~u so~uwa…ĺ ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u ¶i si siŇčsi paso~uwa…ĺ tako~uwanan, saiko~uraj to~u to~usa …ĺipaj ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u itini i s…ônmo~u isiŇčan i, o~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ka…ômaŇčaj wawa no~u ko~uŇčto~uŇč kawko~uŇč ko~u mańßirat…ôŇčaj niŇčra, kinapinapina mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u ka…ômaŇčaj tajni i kafo~uti °an niŇčra, mi…ĺi ¶aj to~u sapa °i ¶…ô…ĺaw a so~uwa…ĺ. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺan paka…ĺajap ¶i si siŇčsi to~u tańßi…¨~…ģaŇč ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u ¶iŇčraan, maŇča…ĺaj sakatajraaw i …ĺo~uma ° ko~uma…ôn to~u sńßo~u~uijiao~u. o~uja marari…¨~…ģaj mipawsa to~u kaka…ôn…ôn ¶i si siŇčsi, patajra ńßan to~u niŇčra i …ĺo~uma ° a ko~uma…ôn, patiko~u ta…ĺaisiŇč i, mi…ĺi ¶aj ńßa ¶a ira ńßo~u ko~u ro~uma paro~umi °a…¨~…ģan saan ńßo~u, maŇča…ĺaj ¶iŇčra pakapa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč a mi…ĺi…ĺis to~u …ĺijo~uk no~u isiŇčan. matija sa o~u mi ¶o~uńßo~uŇčaj ko~u pitiko~u ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u, sańßa ¶…ô ¶aj sa paso~uwa…ĺ to~u kańßa ¶…ô ¶aj no~u …ĺo~uma ° to~u ińßako~uwaaj mapatir…ôŇč ko~u na …ĺo~uma ° ja saan, o~uja iraajaj a …ĺo~uma ° o~u ńßako~uwaaj mapatir…ôŇč ko~uraan saan, saiko~uraj miańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u patińßi ni si siŇčsi to~u pinapina mańß…ô ¶aan ¶iŇčraan, paf…ô…ĺi sa to~u ¶…ô ¶aj mati…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u ańßo~uwi…¨~…ģaj sanaj a fati. iko~ur no~u to~usa mińß…ô ¶a mi…ĺijas to~u ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ mapataj, o~u fata…¨~…ģan no~u °o~urip niŇčra itiniaj i po~uso~uŇč. ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pita…¨~…ģ…ôman itija mińß…ô ¶a, mi…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u tawo~u, nansin nijaro~u a kakitaan no~u pajwan fina ¶a…¨~…ģan mita…¨~…ģ…ôman no~u Ňčasaw. itini to~unini ira ko~u pa ¶…ôki…ĺan a kima…¨~…ģ: saajaw katajni ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u pat…ônak i po~uso~uŇč i, o~uja kakitaan no~u nansin ¶i …ĺiw siŇčsi ko~u mi ¶o~uk…ôraj, kapataj no~u wawa ni …ĺiw siŇčsi i °ajaw, pato~uro~u…¨~…ģan ko~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan wawa ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u a ma…¨~…ģipo~ut, ¶iŇčra to~u ko~u mi…¨~…ģipo~utaj to~una wawa taŇčasa i pasawa…¨~…ģan niŇčra to~u …¨~…ģajkako~u. mapataj ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u i, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni …ĺiw siŇčsi saf…ô…ĺ…ôŇč sa mi…ĺit…ômo~uńß to~u nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw, mińßamńßam patajni i pita…¨~…ģ…ôman no~u saŇčasaw a s…ôra. itini i no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an pita…¨~…ģ…ôman, o~uja satata °akaj ta…¨~…ģ…ôm o~uno~u niŇčra "xi ako~uŇč" no~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw saan. piriri…¨~…ģan:
S.FORM: == Xi Zhiping sinpu == Palalanay ci Xi Zhiping sinpu Xi Zhiping sinpu (Hilber Jakob 1917-1985) o patenakay i pasawalian a Payleng wayfang dintokay no Tinsukiw, 1953 miheca mingitangit ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to fafa'eday citodongay i Kalingko a kowan to piparotoh, patorod to aocoren tonini ci'icelay nai Switzerland tayni i Posong "Nengnengaw", sa:an to pafaloco'an, manga'ay ko pisilsil to tatayni i Posong a malasingsi. Caay ko kafana'an oya masakapahay ho ci Xi Zhiping sinpu ko tayniay i Posong, caay ho ka pihayda ko itiraay a Switzerland, sacecay sa tayni itini misahalaka dademak, midemak to caayay ho ko no patenakay a halaka. Tada manga'ayan ko kalali'ay no Posong to malitosaay a sici to Payleng wayfang dintokay, nai ci Xi Zhiping sinpu ko pisatapangan. Onini a sinpu sa citofay sa to karetengay tofay, mirakarak to kasaco'ed no Posong. O sowal no cecay fafahiyan: kaemangan itira sikosya no Nang siaw i Posong i, harek no lahok to romi'ad mangengneng aca koya pakatofayay mita'elif i ka'ayaw, awa:ay manengneng ko Padaka a tamdaw, manengneng ci Xi Zhiping sinpu miceli' aca "Nga'ay ho sinpu." Oya sa a sinpu mahemek ko pipaca'of: "Nga'ay ho wawa." Mi'epap to tofay a miliyas, onini nga'ayay koda'itay "Nga'ay ho wawa." Sanay, mata'elif to ko mo^tep mihecaan, malo sakafolaw tayra i roma kitakit a caayay ka pawan a ka'ilolan. Nai ni Ou tintosi a sowal, no mako a niharatengan matalaw ci widang to matiniay marikecay a sinpu. O sowal nonini a tintosi takowan, 'ayaw no mihecaan caay ho ka fangcal ko saki'orip no pasawali, o saka'imeraw, ato saka nga'ay milecad to 'orip no itiniay, malakakeridan ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to saki kapolongan a kakaenen wata ko kickic, oya to laloma'an no kapolongan caay ka raheked to pinangan ningra. O nidemakan ni Xi Zhiping sinpu adahay ko nilahecian ningra, tinako, i 60, 70 to'ek no miheca, patireng cingra to kanga'ayan palahaday to cifana'ay sakadademak "Kongtong kaukong" tadamaan, o malasingsiay makikakaay ko polong no kasapitiliodan, ona singsi, saheto o nai Switzerland ato Europ a cifana'ay kapah a singsi. Ira ko cecay tadamaanay a mali'acaay a tawki pasowal sa: ta pitilid ha nangra i Kongtong kawkong i, wata ko talaw ci Xi Zhiping sinpuan, ano masamaamaanay ko nidemakan mikihar cingra, marikec cingra to demak no mitiliday. Mata'elif to ko pinapina a miheca no mitiliday ho i 'ayaw, mahirateng ho ko nika koda'itay no kasafa'inayan, todadayadaya mililis cingra to kafoti'an, to saka fangcal no foti' no kaemangay, ano caay ka nga'ay, micokar to oray matefad i sera i, paorayen ningra ta miliyas, ta mafoti' cingta itiya. Ira ko patado sanay micolar to oray a caayay patenol a wawa, miraoy to sapadipotaw ni Xi Zhiping sinpu. O kacahiwan ho no to'ek mihecaan itiya, caay pakalolol ko wawa to sapa'aca to pitilidan to saka'eca pitilid. Oya malamitomadaway a kakeridan a sinpu pasowal sa: paskoyoc ko 'orip i kaeman a caay pakalolol to sapitilid a payso, nokay sa mipakaen to kolong, ira ko cecay romi'ad tona pakatofay ci Xi Zhiping sinpu mita'elif, licayen ningra koya mitatoyay to kawkaw a wawa nao caay pitilid? Mafana' to kaeca no demak itiya, pasowal han ni Xi Zhiping sinpu: "ano sapitilidananay kiso i, mana demakan, kako sa ko nisafaloco'ay." han ningra, o kasasiroma no kicay to itiyaaay ho ato aniniay, hatira ko nidemakan no Payleng wayfang dintokay no Tinsukiw itini i pasawali a midama to mamipafatad mitilid a kaemangay wawa. Awaay ko misapinangay misa'osi tonini. I 1982 miheca, masapinang ko kaciadada to no fowa' a kang tona itira i Switzerland a mikilim to payso to pacakat ci Xi Zhiping sinpu, dengan to 6 folad ko 'orip iso han no ising ko sowal i cingraan, o nisafaloco'an ningra dengan o pasawaliay finawlan, ngitangit han ningra ko ising to "Kapatay no mako itira i niyaro ako i Posong" saan, caay pitengil to pacecay no ising, minakay tayni i Posong. Ira ko nano misawaday to i kongtong kawkong, minokay tayni pitilidan a malasingsi saci sowal sa: milalad to tayra i do'es no 'okak ko adada ni Xi Zhiping sinpu i, dadaya no romi'adan, matengil ko pilalaling to adada, awaay ko sadama, micocok i faloco' saan. Malawidangay tona mifalicay to sowal ni Xi Zhiping sinpu ci Si singsi pasowal takowanan, saikoray to tosa lipay ni Xi Zhiping sinpu itini i Senmo isingan i, o mitiliday kaemangay wawa no kongtong kawkong ko mahiratengay ningra, kinapinapina mitahidang to kaemangay tayni i kafoti'an ningra, milicay to sapa'icelaw a sowal. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, talifahalan pakalayap ci Si singsi to tahidang ni Xi Zhiping sinpu cingraan, mangalay sakatayraaw i loma' komaen to Shuijiao. Oya marariday mipawsa to kakaenen ci Si singsi, patayra han to ningra i loma' a komaen, patiko talaising i, milicay haca ira ho ko roma paromi'adan saan ho, mangalay cingra pakapaliding a mililis to liyok no isingan. Matiya sa o micohongay ko pitiko ni Xi Zhiping sinpu, sahacecay sa pasowal to kahacecay no loma' to ihakowaay mapatireng ko na loma' ya saan, oya iraayay a loma' o hakowaay mapatireng koraan saan, saikoray miahowid ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to patihi ni Si singsi to pinapina mahecaan cingraan, pafeli sa to cecay matiliday to ahowiday sanay a fati. Ikor no tosa miheca miliyas to ci Xi Zhiping sinpu to hekal mapatay, o fatadan no 'orip ningra itiniay i Posong. Tadamaan ko pitademan itiya miheca, militemoh ko Tawo, Nansin niyaro a kakitaan no Paywan finacadan mitademan no ngasaw. Itini tonini ira ko pacekilan a kimad: Saayaw katayni ni Xi Zhiping sinpu patenak i Posong i, oya kakitaan no Nansin ci Liw singsi ko micokeray, kapatay no wawa ni Liw singsi i 'ayaw, patorodan ko dengan wawa ci Xi Zhiping sinpu a madipot, cingra to ko midipotay tona wawa tangasa i pasawadan ningra to daykako. Mapatay ci Xi Zhiping sinpu i, o laloma'an ni Liw singsi safeleng sa militemoh to nai Switzerland a tamdaw, mihamham patayni i pitademan no sangasaw a sera. Itini i no laloma'an pitademan, oya satata'akay tadem ono ningra "Xi akong" no Switzerland a tamdaw saan. Piriridan:
S.PHON: == xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u == pa…ĺa…ĺanaj ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u (ńßi…ĺb~b~v…ôr *ako~ub~b~v ****-****) o~u pat…ônakaj i pasawa…ĺian a paj…ĺ…ôŇč wajfaŇč …¨~…ģinto~ukaj no~u tinso~u~ukiw, **** mińß…ô ¶a miŇčitaŇčit ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u fafa °…ô…¨~…ģaj ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i ka…ĺiŇčko~u a ko~uwan to~u piparo~uto~uńß, pato~uro~u…¨~…ģ to~u ao~u ¶o~ur…ôn to~unini ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺaj nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ tajni i po~uso~uŇč "n…ôŇčn…ôŇčaw", sa:an to~u pafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an, maŇča °aj ko~u pisi…ĺsi…ĺ to~u tatajni i po~uso~uŇč a ma…ĺasiŇčsi. ¶aaj ko~u kafana °an o~uja mat…ôŇči…ĺ ko~u pi…ĺa…ĺa…ĺiŇč to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, awaaj ko~u sa…¨~…ģama, mi ¶o~u ¶o~uk i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° saan. ma…ĺawi…¨~…ģaŇčaj to~una mifa…ĺi ¶aj to~u so~uwa…ĺ ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u ¶i si siŇčsi paso~uwa…ĺ tako~uwanan, saiko~uraj to~u to~usa …ĺipaj ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u itini i s…ônmo~u isiŇčan i, o~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ka…ômaŇčaj wawa no~u ko~uŇčto~uŇč kawko~uŇč ko~u mańßirat…ôŇčaj niŇčra, kinapinapina mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u ka…ômaŇčaj tajni i kafo~uti °an niŇčra, mi…ĺi ¶aj to~u sapa °i ¶…ô…ĺaw a so~uwa…ĺ. ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺan paka…ĺajap ¶i si siŇčsi to~u tańßi…¨~…ģaŇč ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u ¶iŇčraan, maŇča…ĺaj sakatajraaw i …ĺo~uma ° ko~uma…ôn to~u sńßo~u~uijiao~u. o~uja marari…¨~…ģaj mipawsa to~u kaka…ôn…ôn ¶i si siŇčsi, patajra ńßan to~u niŇčra i …ĺo~uma ° a ko~uma…ôn, patiko~u ta…ĺaisiŇč i, mi…ĺi ¶aj ńßa ¶a ira ńßo~u ko~u ro~uma paro~umi °a…¨~…ģan saan ńßo~u, maŇča…ĺaj ¶iŇčra pakapa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč a mi…ĺi…ĺis to~u …ĺijo~uk no~u isiŇčan. matija sa o~u mi ¶o~uńßo~uŇčaj ko~u pitiko~u ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u, sańßa ¶…ô ¶aj sa paso~uwa…ĺ to~u kańßa ¶…ô ¶aj no~u …ĺo~uma ° to~u ińßako~uwaaj mapatir…ôŇč ko~u na …ĺo~uma ° ja saan, o~uja iraajaj a …ĺo~uma ° o~u ńßako~uwaaj mapatir…ôŇč ko~uraan saan, saiko~uraj miańßo~uwi…¨~…ģ ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u patińßi ni si siŇčsi to~u pinapina mańß…ô ¶aan ¶iŇčraan, paf…ô…ĺi sa to~u ¶…ô ¶aj mati…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u ańßo~uwi…¨~…ģaj sanaj a fati. iko~ur no~u to~usa mińß…ô ¶a mi…ĺijas to~u ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ mapataj, o~u fata…¨~…ģan no~u °o~urip niŇčra itiniaj i po~uso~uŇč. ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pita…¨~…ģ…ôman itija mińß…ô ¶a, mi…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u tawo~u, nansin nijaro~u a kakitaan no~u pajwan fina ¶a…¨~…ģan mita…¨~…ģ…ôman no~u Ňčasaw. itini to~unini ira ko~u pa ¶…ôki…ĺan a kima…¨~…ģ: saajaw katajni ni xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u pat…ônak i po~uso~uŇč i, o~uja kakitaan no~u nansin ¶i …ĺiw siŇčsi ko~u mi ¶o~uk…ôraj, kapataj no~u wawa ni …ĺiw siŇčsi i °ajaw, pato~uro~u…¨~…ģan ko~u …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan wawa ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u a ma…¨~…ģipo~ut, ¶iŇčra to~u ko~u mi…¨~…ģipo~utaj to~una wawa taŇčasa i pasawa…¨~…ģan niŇčra to~u …¨~…ģajkako~u. mapataj ¶i xi *ńßipiŇč sinpo~u~u i, o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ni …ĺiw siŇčsi saf…ô…ĺ…ôŇč sa mi…ĺit…ômo~uńß to~u nai swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw, mińßamńßam patajni i pita…¨~…ģ…ôman no~u saŇčasaw a s…ôra. itini i no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an pita…¨~…ģ…ôman, o~uja satata °akaj ta…¨~…ģ…ôm o~uno~u niŇčra "xi ako~uŇč" no~u swit*…ôr…ĺan…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw saan. piriri…¨~…ģan:
